Home / Services / Trim & Molding Installation

Trim & Molding Installation

Add elegance and detail to your home with professionally installed trim and molding.

Jolly Roger Custom Woodworking specializes in trim and molding installation that enhances the beauty and character of your home. We understand that trim and molding are the finishing touches that can transform a room from ordinary to extraordinary. Whether you're building a new home or renovating an existing one, we'll provide you with expert trim and molding installation services.

We offer a wide range of trim and molding options, including baseboards, crown molding, door casings, and window casings. We'll help you choose the right trim and molding styles to complement your home's architecture and your personal taste. We also offer custom trim and molding designs to create a unique look for your home.

Our experienced trim and molding installers are skilled in all aspects of trim and molding installation, from precise cutting to seamless joining. We use only high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure that your trim and molding is installed correctly and looks beautiful for years to come. We pay attention to detail, ensuring clean lines and perfect miters. Given Virginia Beach's humidity, we use materials and techniques to prevent warping and other moisture-related issues.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and Design – We discuss your trim and molding needs and preferences.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection – We help you choose the right trim and molding styles for your home.
  3. 03 Step 3: Installation – Our skilled installers install your trim and molding with precision and care.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing – We caulk, sand, and paint your trim and molding for a perfect finish.

Benefits

  • Add elegance and detail to your home
  • Increase your home's value
  • Conceal imperfections and protect walls
  • Create a custom look that reflects your style

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of trim and molding do you install?

We install a variety of trim and molding, including baseboards, crown molding, door casings, and window casings.

Can you match existing trim and molding?

Yes, we can match existing trim and molding styles to ensure a seamless look.

Do you offer painting services for trim and molding?

Yes, we offer painting services to finish your trim and molding for a perfect look.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with trim & molding installation? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +17578696326
